Docs API
Install Run Auth

Configuring the server

The server reads its configuration from environment variables so that the same binary can run unchanged in development and in production. Every option has a sensible default except the vault path and the authentication token, which you must set explicitly before the server will accept any request. The sections below describe the variables in the order you will usually need them.

Running against a vault

Point the server at a directory of Markdown files and give it a token, then start it. The token is a shared secret that the browser extension and any other client must present on every call, so choose something that is hard to guess and keep it out of your shell history. 

ENGRAM_VAULT_PATH=./vault ENGRAM_AUTH_TOKEN=dev uv run engram
Privacy
